compiled_state.title: Add bypass-gates structural marker and explicit bypass instruction to Batch Group 5 hook-install in onboarding SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Strengthen Batch Group 5 (hook-install) in plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md by:
1. Adding a machine-readable structural marker <!-- hook-install: bypass-gates --> that
   the structural test (T1) verifies
2. Adding an explicit instruction that the hook installation commit uses the bypass flag
   to skip the review gate and test gate (since hooks are pre-built plugin components,
   not custom code changes)

This implements DD4: the hook installation commit bypasses the review and test gate checks.

The ordering constraint (hooks installed last, after groups 1-4) is already documented in
the SKILL.md's ORDERING CONSTRAINT section. This task adds the bypass marker and the
explicit bypass commit instruction to the Batch Group 5 / hook-install section.

### What to add
In the Batch Group 5 section (## Batch Group 5: hook-install, around line 1137), add:

1. Structural marker comment immediately after the skip guard comment:
   <!-- hook-install: bypass-gates -->
2. After the hook manager detection and install steps complete, add an explicit commit
   instruction that uses git commit with the flag that skips pre-commit hooks
   (the "no-verify" flag) since hooks are pre-built plugin components, not custom code.
   Include a comment in the instruction explaining that this is intentional.

### File to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (Batch Group 5 section, around lines 1137-1175)

### Considerations from story
- [Reliability] Interrupted onboarding between group 4 and group 5: add a note:
  "If onboarding is interrupted after group 4 but before group 5 completes, re-running
  /dso:onboarding will detect that artifacts are committed but hooks are not installed,
  and will resume from group 5."
- [Reliability] Hook orphan: validate git working tree state before hook install commit.
  Check that git status shows something to commit before running the hook install commit.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
- [ ] Structural marker hook-install: bypass-gates is present in SKILL.md
  Verify: grep -q "hook-install: bypass-gates" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] The bypass flag appears in the hook install commit instruction in SKILL.md
  Verify: grep -q "no-verify" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker.*PASS"
- [ ] Batch Group 5 section still present (not accidentally removed or renumbered)
  Verify: grep -q "^## Batch Group 5: hook-install" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh still passes (6 batch groups with unique non-empty names)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-onboarding-batch-groups.sh
- [ ] check-referential-integrity.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh
